rationale: Section 31.11(h) expressly excludes overpayments caused by a change of exemption status, routing those to Sections 26.15 or 42.43. Increasing the homestead exemption triggers that carve-out, so no conflict arises.
quote: This section does not apply to an overpayment caused by a change of exemption status or correction of a tax roll, including an overpayment received after a correction of a tax roll as a result of an appeal under Chapter 42. Such an overpayment is covered by Section 26.15 or 42.43, as applicable.
